title: docs: fix typo in the --dns-option flag
body: The `--dns-option` flag is misnamed in the documentation. No alias for `--dns-opt` was found in the code. The CLI never works for it. See `--dns-opt` instead of `--dns-option`: https://github.com/podman-container-tools/buildah/blob/e4b285a365f3f15b6050932524744216b003d986/docs/buildah-from.1.md?plain=1#L305 https://github.com/podman-container-tools/buildah/blob/e4b285a365f3f15b6050932524744216b003d986/docs/buildah-build.1.md?plain=1#L681 https://github.com/podman-container-tools/buildah/blob/e4b285a365f3f15b6050932524744216b003d986/docs/buildah-run.1.md?plain=1#L193 Also `buildah run` doesn't receive the `--dns-option` as a flag, but parses it from the `buildah.json`. https://github.com/podman-container-tools/buildah/blob/e4b285a365f3f15b6050932524744216b003d986/buildah.go#L446-L456 Therefore I propose to rewrite the description from: ```diff git diff --staged -- docs/buildah-run.1.md diff --git a/docs/buildah-run.1.md b/docs/buildah-run.1.md index a46b6c4b2..c50379828 100644 --- a/docs/buildah-run.1.md +++ b/docs/buildah-run.1.md @@ -190,7 +190,7 @@ Sets the configuration for the network namespace for the container. Valid _mode_ values are: -- **none**: no networking. Invalid if using **--dns**, **--dns-opt**, or **--dns-search**; +- **none**: no networking. Invalid if the builder is configured with **--dns**, **--dns-option**, or **--dns-search**; - **host**: use the host network stack. Note: the host mode gives the container full access to local system services such as D-bus and is therefore considered insecure; - **ns:**_path_: path to a network namespace to join; - **private**: create a new namespace for the container (default) ``` -------------------------------------------------- ### Steps to reproduce the issue ``` bash lm00@lm00:~/src/buildah$ ./bin/buildah --root /tmp/4/run-58638/root --runroot /tmp/4/run-58638/runroot --storage-driver vfs from --dns-opt use-vc scratch Error: unknown flag: --dns-opt ``` ```bash lm00@lm00:~/src/buildah$ ./bin/buildah --root /tmp/4/run-58638/root --runroot /tmp/4/run-58638/runroot --storage-driver vfs build --dns-opt use-vc . Error: unknown flag: --dns-opt ``` ```bash m00@lm00:~/src/buildah$ ./bin/buildah --root /tmp/4/run-58638/root --runroot /tmp/4/run-58638/runroot --storage-driver vfs run --dns-opt use-vc my-test true Error: unknown flag: --dns-opt ``` ---------------------------------------------- ### buildah version output ```yaml lm00@lm00:~/src/buildah$ ./bin/buildah version Version: 1.45.0-dev Go Version: go1.25.11 X:nodwarf5 Image Spec: 1.1.1 Runtime Spec: 1.3.0 image Version: 5.41.0-dev Git Commit: 51c40cfc557e129248bb477510d18f5ca69a87dd Built: Thu Jul 9 21:41:40 2026 OS/Arch: linux/amd64 BuildPlatform: linux/amd64 ``` ### buildah info output ```yaml { "host": { "Distribution": { "distribution": "fedora", "version": "43" }, "MemFree": 2281463808, "MemTotal": 33560072192, "OCIRuntime": "crun", "SwapFree": 8589930496, "SwapTotal": 8589930496, "arch": "amd64", "cpus": 16, "hostname": "lm00.device", "kernel": "7.0.12-101.fc43.x86_64", "os": "linux", "rootless": false, "uptime": "7h 56m 43.73s (Approximately 0.29 days)", "variant": "" }, "store": { "ContainerStore": { "number": 0 }, "GraphDriverName": "overlay", "GraphImageStore": "", "GraphOptions": [ "imagestore=/usr/lib/containers/storage", "overlay.mountopt=nodev,metacopy=on" ], "GraphRoot": "/var/lib/containers/storage", "GraphStatus": { "Backing Filesystem": "btrfs", "Native Overlay Diff": "false", "Supports d_type": "true", "Supports shifting": "true", "Supports volatile": "true", "Using metacopy": "true" }, "GraphTransientStore": false, "ImageStore": { "number": 2 }, "RunRoot": "/run/containers/storage" } } ```
